title: Transwell migration assay
steps: Remove serum containing medium from cultures.
Thoroughly but gently rinse cultures with PBS to remove all serum.
Replace culture medium with serum-free RPIM 1640. Return cultures to incubator for 24 hours.
Migrated cells (on the underside) were fixed with formaldehyde for 10 min and then stained with crystal violet (Beyotime Biotechnology, Jiangsu, China).
The stained membranes were then cut and placed on a glass slide.
The number of cells that migrated to the the bottom surface was counted under an optical microscope.
creator: Shuangshuang Li
